modules.name: flutter-app-pack
modules.summary: Flutter app development harness: build recovery, performance, security, testing, and Hive local-storage skills.

modules.name: market-strategy
modules.summary: Product/market discovery harness: 8 strategy-role skills (target, market, positioning, GTM, risk) orchestrated into a Discovery Package, plus a reusable market-economic perspective library.

modules.name: ffmpeg-media
modules.summary: FFmpeg/media-rendering config harness: vertical-video render defaults (resolution, fps, Ken Burns motion, caption burn-in, safe-area, BGM, timeout) plus the JSON Schema that validates them.

modules.name: graph-knowledge
modules.summary: Knowledge-navigation harness for large codebases and personal-knowledge repos: an automated knowledge-graph skill (graphify) for ~70x cheaper graph-first queries over big corpora, plus a Think-Tank sparring-partner skill (think) that stress-tests decisions instead of agreeing.

modules.name: ops-self-evolution
modules.summary: Platform-ops harness: two execution-governance skills. execution-governance enforces tier-based write gates, a 4-step promotion flow, a circuit breaker, and evidence-only completion; self-evolution gates the agent's own self-improvement (research scan, memory reflect, risk-classified change review, 3-tier claim validation).

modules.name: video-gen
modules.summary: Short-form video-generation config harness: a ComfyUI WAN image-to-video workflow template plus ComfyUI image/video generation defaults (server endpoint, model/checkpoint slots, sampler, steps, cfg, quality gates) and the JSON Schema that validates them. Self-hosted ComfyUI, no provider API keys.
